config.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Reset all values on panel. 
	"""
# Write your script here	
	system.perspective.closeDock('rightP')
	system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
	headerLabel = "Add"
	messageType = 'ImageConfigurationPanel'
	payload = {'UnitId':'','headerLabel':headerLabel,'areaId':-1,'lineId':-1,
				'WorkStationId':-1,'imageName':'','imageDescription':'','isActive':int(1),
				'imageTypeId':-1,'url':''}

"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Reset area, line and workstation values on model value change. 
	"""
	self.parent.parent.getChild("cntArea").getChild("drpArea").props.value = -1
	self.parent.parent.getChild("cntLine").getChild("drpLine").props.value = -1
	self.parent.parent.getChild("cntWorkStation").getChild("drpWorkStation").props.value = -1

onChange.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 04/09/2024
		Purpose: Check Special character in text. 
	"""
	import re
	 
	def contains_special_characters(input_string):
	    # Define a regex pattern for special characters
	    pattern = r'[^a-zA-Z0-9_ ]'
	    
	    # Search for special characters
	    if re.search(pattern, input_string):
	        return True
	    else:
	        return False
	 
	# Calling Special Character Check Function
	input_string = self.props.text
	if contains_special_characters(input_string):
	    self.props.text = str(self.props.text)[:-1]

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Upload image to file respository location. 
	"""
	try:
	#start of try block
		name = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntImageName").getChild("txt").props.text
		if len(name) > 0:
			import os
			fixedDirectory ="//10.109.1.15/Ignition/MasterImage"
			
			# accessing model dropdown 
			model=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntModel").getChild("drpModel").props.value#.lower()
			optionsModel=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntModel").getChild("drpModel").props.options
			optionsModel=system.dataset.toPyDataSet(optionsModel)
			system.perspective.print(optionsModel)
			for opt in optionsModel:
			    if opt['value'] == model:
			        model = opt['label'].lower()
			        break
			system.perspective.print(model)
			
			# accessing area dropdown
			area=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntArea").getChild("drpArea").props.value
			optionsArea=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntArea").getChild("drpArea").props.options
			optionsArea=system.dataset.toPyDataSet(optionsArea)
			system.perspective.print(optionsArea)
			for opt in optionsArea:
			    if opt['value'] == area:
			        area = opt['label'].lower()
			        break
			system.perspective.print(area)
			
			# accessing line dropdown
			line=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntLine").getChild("drpLine").props.value
			optionsline=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntLine").getChild("drpLine").props.options
			optionsline=system.dataset.toPyDataSet(optionsline)
			system.perspective.print(optionsline)
			for opt in optionsline:
			    if opt['value'] == line:
			        line = opt['label'].lower()
			        break
			system.perspective.print(line)
			
			# accessing worksatation dropdown
			workstation=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntWorkStation").getChild("drpWorkStation").props.value
			optionsWorkstation=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntWorkStation").getChild("drpWorkStation").props.options
			optionsWorkstation=system.dataset.toPyDataSet(optionsWorkstation)
			system.perspective.print(optionsWorkstation)
			for opt in optionsWorkstation:
			    if opt['value'] == workstation:
			        workstation = opt['label'].lower()
			        break
			system.perspective.print(workstation)
			
			
			drpSelection="/"+model+"/"+area+"/"+line+"/"+workstation
			directory=fixedDirectory+drpSelection
			
			#creating directory if not exist
			if not os.path.exists(directory):
			    # Create the directory
			    system.perspective.print(os.makedirs(directory))
			    #print(os.path.exists(directory))
			    system.perspective.print("Directory created successfully!")
			else:
			    system.perspective.print("Directory already exists!")
			
			#getting timestamp
			import time
			timeStamp = (str(time.time()).split("."))[0]
			
#			######
			#filePath = "C:\Program Files\Inductive Automation\Ignition\webserver\webapps\main\ImageMaster\\"
#			filePath = fixedDirectory+"/"+model+"/"+area+"/"+line+"/"+workstation+"//"

			#generating final image path
			imageNameTextField=name+timeStamp
#			self.view.custom.imageNameTextField = imageNameTextField
			self.view.custom.imageNameTextField = name
			imageName = "//"+ imageNameTextField + '.' + str(event.file.name).split('.')[-1]
			imagePath = directory + imageName
			
			#putting image to directory
			event.file.copyTo(imagePath)
			url = "http:"+imagePath.strip()
#			url = "http:"+imagePath+imageName
			system.perspective.print("URL = %s"%url)
			self.getSibling("Image").props.source = url
			self.custom.url = url #drpSelection
			
		else:
			state = 'warning'
			message = 'Please Enter Image Name before uploading Image.'
			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")	
	
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='ImageConfigurationPanel'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/Master/ImageConfigurationPanel')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onFileReceived  -> cntImageUpload/ImageUpload')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Reset all values on panel. 
	"""
	# Write your script here	
	system.perspective.closeDock('rightP')
	system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
	headerLabel = "Add"
	messageType = 'ImageConfigurationPanel'
	payload = {'UnitId':'','headerLabel':headerLabel,'areaId':-1,'lineId':-1,
				'WorkStationId':-1,'imageName':'','imageDescription':'','isActive':int(1),
				'imageTypeId':-1}	 			
	system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )
	try:
		url = "C:\Program Files\Inductive Automation\Ignition\webserver\webapps\main"+ self.parent.parent.getChild("cntImageUpload").getChild("ImageUpload").custom.url
		system.perspective.print("url")
		system.perspective.print(url)
		Project_VECV.Master.ImageMasterConfiguration.Delete.deleteImage(url)
	except:
		pass

"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Add/update image data in db. 
	"""
	try:
		headerlabel = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntHeader").getChild("lblHeader").props.text
		model_id = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntModel").getChild("drpModel").props.value
		area_id = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntArea").getChild("drpArea").props.value
		bom_id = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntBOM").getChild("drpBOM").props.value
		line_id = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntLine").getChild("drpLine").props.value
		workstation_id = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntWorkStation").getChild("drpWorkStation").props.value
		#imagename = self.view.custom.imageNameTextField
		imagename = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntImageName").getChild("txt").props.text
		description = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntImageDescription").getChild("txt").props.text
		imagetype_id = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntImageType").getChild("drpImageType").props.value
		active = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntActive").getChild("drpActive").props.value
		createdBy = self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
		
		fixedDirectory="http:"+"//srdwsmesqa01/Ignition/MasterImage"
		name = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntImageUpload").getChild("ImageUpload").custom.url#.split(fixedDirectory)[1]
		system.perspective.print(name)
		
		
		if headerlabel == "Add":
			Id=0
			result=Project_VECV.NamedQuery.Master.ImageMasterConfiguration.ImageMasterConfiguration.insertImage(Id,model_id, area_id, line_id, workstation_id, imagename, description, imagetype_id, active, createdBy, name,bom_id)
		else:
			Id=self.view.custom.UnitId
			if str(self.parent.parent.getChild("cntImageUpload").custom.imageToRemove) != str(name):
				system.perspective.print("line 20")
				
			result=Project_VECV.NamedQuery.Master.ImageMasterConfiguration.ImageMasterConfiguration.insertImage(Id,model_id, area_id, line_id, workstation_id, imagename, description, imagetype_id, active, createdBy, name,bom_id)
		if(result==1):
			if headerlabel=="Add":
				message = "Image details added successfully."
				auditMsg=str(imagename) +" Image details added successfully."
			else:
				message = "Image details updated successfully."
				auditMsg=str(imagename) +" Image details updated successfully"
			state = "success"
		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")	
		
		messageType = 'tableRefresh'    	 			
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )
		
		system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
		system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
		
		#addToAuditLogStartBlock
		system.perspective.print(auditMsg)
		category='Master Configuration'
		subCategory='ImageMaster Configuration'
		if(Id!=0):
			prevDesc=self.view.getChild("root").custom.payload
			curDesc = {
				"modelId":model_id,
				"areaId":area_id,
				"bomId":bom_id,
				"lineId":line_id,
				"workStationId":workstation_id,
				"imageName":imagename,
				"imageDescription":description,
				"imageTypeId":imagetype_id,
				"isActive":active
			}
			system.perspective.print(prevDesc)
			system.perspective.print(curDesc)
			description=str(auditMsg)+"Where ID="+str(Id)+" With Previous Data->"+str(prevDesc)+" and Updated Data->"+str(curDesc)
		else:
			description=str(auditMsg)
		createdBy=self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddAuditLogs(category, subCategory, description, createdBy)
		#addAuditLogEndBlock
	except:
		screenName ='ImageMaster Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/ImageMaster Pannel')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onActionPerformed -> cntSave/btn_Save')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

messageHandlers.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: store image data in json format. 
	"""
	# implement your handler here
	load=payload.copy()
	system.perspective.print("Printing payload of msg handler----------->")
	system.perspective.print(payload)
	load.pop('headerLabel')
	system.perspective.print("msg handler1----------->")
	import json
	load_json = json.dumps(load)
	self.view.getChild("root").custom.payload=load_json
	system.perspective.print("msg handler2----------->")
	system.perspective.print("payload msghandler3------------->")
	system.perspective.print(self.view.getChild("root").custom.payload)
	system.perspective.print("Exit ImageConfigurationPanel")

"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Insert row values into respective fields. 
	"""
	# implement your handler here
	try:
		self.view.custom.UnitId = payload['Id']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntHeader").getChild("lblHeader").props.text=payload['headerLabel']
		if payload['headerLabel'] != 'Add':
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntImageUpload").getChild("ImageUpload").custom.url = payload['url']
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntImageUpload").custom.imageToRemove =  payload['url']
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntImageUpload").getChild("Image").props.source = payload['url']
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntImageName").getChild("txt").custom.isSelectedImageName = payload['imageName']
		else:
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntImageUpload").getChild("Image").props.source='/system/images/VECV/no-image-available.png'
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntImageUpload").getChild("ImageUpload").custom.url = '/system/images/VECV/no-image-available.png'
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntModel").getChild("drpModel").props.value=payload['modelId']

		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntArea").getChild("drpArea").props.value=payload['areaId']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntLine").getChild("drpLine").props.value=payload['lineId']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntWorkStation").getChild("drpWorkStation").props.value=payload['workStationId']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntImageName").getChild("txt").props.text=payload['imageName']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntImageDescription").getChild("txt").props.text=payload['imageDescription']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntImageType").getChild("drpImageType").props.value=payload['imageTypeId']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntActive").getChild("drpActive").props.value=payload['isActive']
	except:
		screenName ='Image Master Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Master Configuration/ImageConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('MessageHandler-->ImageConfigurationPanel')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)
